metadata.title: Multivate - Tech & German for your career in Germany
metadata.description: Structured learning paths in tech and German language to help you study, work, and live your dream.

nav.cartEmpty: Nothing saved yet. Add courses from the catalog.

hero.title: Build Tech Skills & Master German to Launch Your
hero.subtitle: Structured learning paths in tech and German language to help you study, work, and live your dream.
hero.mockupAlt: App preview with learners, course tracks, and progress
hero.searchHint: Tip: leave empty and press Search to open the full course list.

teach.title: Teach on Multivate
teach.body: Share your expertise with motivated learners building tech and language skills for Germany. Choose your teaching focus, grow your audience, and use tools built for structured programs.
teach.bullet1Body: Publish cohorts or self-paced tracks with clear outcomes employers recognize.
teach.bullet2Body: Connect with students who are serious about relocation, careers, and certification paths.
teach.panelBody: Pick the areas that match your background. We will walk you through onboarding and course setup.
teach.panelLi1: Tech tracks: data, cloud, AI, web, and career readiness.
teach.panelLi2: German language levels aligned with study and work goals.
teach.panelLi3: Workshops and intensives for teams and organizations.

explore.title: Explore every course we cover
explore.body: Published courses appear here. Save what you like, then enroll from your dashboard when you are signed in as a student.
explore.viewAll: View all on the courses page
explore.empty: No courses are available yet. Check back soon.

challenges.challengeTitle: Why It Feels Hard to Succeed
challenges.c1Body: Confusing resources and no clear path forward.
challenges.c2Body: Unclear opportunities and no structured direction.
challenges.c3Body: Expensive or outdated courses that don't help.
challenges.s1Body: Step-by-step guidance from beginner to expert.
challenges.s2Body: Learn in-demand skills and get job-ready.
challenges.s3Body: High-quality education that fits your budget.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works
howItWorks.sub: Four focused steps from signup to credential, built for busy adults.
howItWorks.step2Body: Pick a course that matches your goals.
howItWorks.step3Body: Learn at your own pace with expert guidance.
howItWorks.step4Body: Earn certificates and boost your career.

topCourses.heading: Skills to transform your career and life
topCourses.sub: Programs built for employability, relocation readiness, and portfolios you can show in interviews.

testimonials.heading: Learners who changed course with Multivate

footer.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Journey to Germany?
footer.ctaBody: Start building tech skills and German language mastery with programs designed for study, work, and life in Germany.
footer.tagline: Tech skills and German language training to help you study, work, and thrive in Germany.
footer.newsletterBody: Stay updated with the latest courses and news.

login.brandTitle: Pick up where you left off.
login.brandDesc: Your courses, progress, and certificates are ready when you are - on any device.
login.title: Sign in to your account
login.subtitle: Use your email and password to continue.
login.errorProfileIncomplete: Your profile is not complete yet. Finish registration, or contact support if you already had an account.
login.mfaSubtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. Enter it below to finish signing in.
login.mfaSendAgain: Didn't get a code? Send again
login.mfaSentAgain: We sent a new code to your email.
login.mfaSpamHint: Can't find it? Check spam or promotions and search for Multivate.
login.mfaFallbackCode: We couldn't reach your inbox right now. Use this code: {code}

register.brandDesc: Skills, language, and career support in one place - structured paths, clear progress, and certificates you can show employers.
register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Choose your role, complete the short questionnaire, then set your password. We email a 6-digit code (valid 5 minutes); your account is created after you verify it.
register.step1Hint: Choose how you want to join Multivate.
register.step2Hint: Answer the questions for your role. You can go back to change your role if needed.
register.step3Hint: Set your name, email, and password. We send a verification code to your inbox when you continue.
register.step4Hint: Enter the 6-digit code from your email. It expires after 5 minutes.
register.otpSubtitle: We sent a code to {email}. Enter it below. The code expires in 5 minutes.
register.otpSpamHint: Can't find it? Check spam or promotions and search for Multivate.
register.otpFallbackCode: We couldn't reach your inbox right now. Use this code: {code}
register.name: Full name
register.errRole: Please select how you want to join.
register.errTerms: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
register.errPasswordLen: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.errEducation: Please select your highest level of education.
register.errPreferredFormats: Please describe how you prefer to learn.

forgotPassword.brandDesc: We will email you a short code to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.heroAlt: Person signing in on a laptop
forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send a verification code.
forgotPassword.resetSubtitle: Enter the code we sent to {email}.
forgotPassword.sendAgain: Didn't get a code? Send again
forgotPassword.sentAgain: We sent a new code to your email.
forgotPassword.spamHint: Can't find it? Check spam or promotions and search for Multivate.
forgotPassword.fallbackCode: We couldn't reach your inbox right now. Use this code: {code}
forgotPassword.startError: We could not start password reset.
forgotPassword.resetError: We could not reset your password.
forgotPassword.networkError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

dashboard.adminEnrollmentsBlurb: Each row links a learner to a course and the instructor teaching it. Students enroll from the course page. Instructors see their learners under Instructor > Students.

dataMgmt.hubIntro: Students enroll in courses. Instructors see their learners. Admins see the full picture for support and audits.
dataMgmt.cardStudentBody: Browse the catalog, enroll while signed in as a student, then track progress on your dashboard.
dataMgmt.cardInstructorBody: Courses you teach list enrollments under Students. You see the same learners admins see, filtered to your courses.
dataMgmt.cardAdminBody: Data & enrollments lists every enrollment with learner, course, and instructor for support and audits.
dataMgmt.recentEmpty: No enrollments yet - have a student join a course from the catalog.

relationships.studentInstructorsSubtitle: Each course shows who is teaching it.
relationships.instructorRosterBlurb: Each row is one student enrolled in one of your courses. Learners need a student account to enroll from the catalog.

shell.instructorEncouragementBody: Keep building courses your students love.
shell.adminProBody: Advanced analytics and priority support are on the way.

learningProfile.bannerBody: Share your current skills and what you want to learn next so we can tailor recommendations.
learningProfile.welcomeAfterRegister: Welcome! Complete this short form next - it helps us understand your background and what you want to learn.
learningProfile.title: Your learning profile
learningProfile.subtitle: Tell us what you already know and what you want to learn so we can recommend the right paths.
learningProfile.currentSkillsHint: List tools, languages, or domains you are comfortable with (for example Python, Excel, German B1).
learningProfile.currentSkillsPlaceholder: e.g. HTML/CSS basics, customer service, project coordination…
learningProfile.skillsToLearnLabel: What you want to learn next
learningProfile.skillsToLearnHint: Be specific: topics, tools, certifications, or career skills.
learningProfile.skillsToLearnPlaceholder: e.g. cloud fundamentals on AWS, data analysis with SQL, business German for interviews…
learningProfile.learningGoalsHint: What outcomes do you want in the next 3-12 months?
learningProfile.learningGoalsPlaceholder: e.g. pass a certification, change role, relocate, study in Germany…
learningProfile.preferredFormatsHint: Short courses, live sessions, projects, reading, or a mix. Whatever works for you.
learningProfile.preferredFormatsPlaceholder: e.g. short video lessons + weekly live Q&A + hands-on projects
learningProfile.weeklyHoursLabel: Time you can invest per week
learningProfile.careerDirectionHint: Helps us align recommendations with your plans.
learningProfile.careerDirectionPlaceholder: e.g. move into data roles, teach online, work in Germany in IT…
learningProfile.privacyNote: Your answers are stored with your account and used to improve guidance. You can update them anytime.
learningProfile.errForbidden: This area is only available to students.
learningProfile.requiredSkillsToLearn: Please describe what you want to learn in the field “What you want to learn next”.
learningProfile.notStudentBody: This questionnaire is for learners with a student account. Switch role or use a student account to continue.

teachingProfile.title: Your teaching profile
teachingProfile.subtitle: Keep your expertise and teaching focus up to date for students and the Multivate team.
teachingProfile.expertiseHint: Domains, tools, certifications, or industries you are strongest in.
teachingProfile.expertisePlaceholder: e.g. data literacy, Python for beginners, career coaching for international students…
teachingProfile.bioHint: How you teach, what learners can expect from you, and any classroom philosophy.
teachingProfile.bioPlaceholder: A short overview of your teaching style and experience…
teachingProfile.subjectsHint: Course topics, stacks, or languages you are comfortable leading.
teachingProfile.subjectsPlaceholder: e.g. SQL fundamentals, UX research, German B1-B2…
teachingProfile.formatsPlaceholder: e.g. live cohorts, async video, office hours, project reviews…
teachingProfile.linksPlaceholder: LinkedIn, personal site, GitHub, sample syllabus URL…
teachingProfile.privacyNote: You can update this information anytime. It is stored with your instructor account.
teachingProfile.errForbidden: This area is only available to instructors.
teachingProfile.requiredCore: Please fill expertise, teaching biography, and subjects taught.
teachingProfile.notInstructorBody: This questionnaire is for instructor accounts. Switch role or use an instructor account to continue.

studentPayments.title: Payments
studentPayments.intro: A clear history of every charge associated with your learner account.
studentPayments.empty: No payments recorded yet. When you complete a course checkout, it will appear here.

bankTransfer.studentOnlyBody: Switch to a student account to enroll and pay for courses.
bankTransfer.title: Pay by bank transfer
bankTransfer.subtitle: Transfer the exact Naira amount below and include your payment reference in the transfer description.
bankTransfer.referenceHint: Add this reference when you send the transfer so we can match your payment.
bankTransfer.copyFailed: We couldn't copy. Select the reference and copy it manually.
bankTransfer.txnHint: After you transfer, paste the reference from your bank receipt here.
bankTransfer.waitingBody: Thanks. Our team will confirm your transfer and notify you when your course is ready.
bankTransfer.verifyError: We could not verify that payment yet.
bankTransfer.networkError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

bankTransferSuccess.title: You're enrolled!
bankTransferSuccess.body: Your payment was confirmed. The course is in your dashboard now. Start learning when you are ready.

bankTransferFailed.title: Payment not confirmed
bankTransferFailed.body: We couldn't confirm your payment yet. Check your reference and try again, or contact support if you already transferred.

paymentsCheckout.studentOnlyBody: Switch to a student account or open the student dashboard to pay for courses.
paymentsCheckout.title: Complete your enrollment
paymentsCheckout.subtitle: Review this course, then confirm payment. You will be enrolled as soon as checkout succeeds.
paymentsCheckout.gatewayNote: Payment and enrollment are recorded together at checkout.
paymentsCheckout.networkError: Connection problem. Please try again. Please try again.
paymentsCheckout.loadCourseError: We could not load course details. You can still complete checkout.

coursesTab.cartBody: Courses you saved from the site. Enroll when you are ready. They stay here until you remove them.
coursesTab.cartEmpty: Your cart is empty. Browse the catalog and use “Add to cart” on any course to save it here.
coursesTab.networkError: Connection problem. Please try again. Please try again.
coursesTab.studentOnlyHint: Switch to a student account to enroll from your cart.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your Multivate account, preferences, and session.
settings.refreshErr: We couldn't load the latest profile.
settings.preferencesSubtitle: These options apply on this device only.
settings.prefEmailUpdatesHint: We will respect this preference when marketing email is enabled for your region.
settings.prefCourseRemindersHint: Occasional reminders to continue courses you have started.
settings.billingSubtitle: View invoices, cards on file, and payment history.
settings.billingBody: Payment records from course purchases and subscriptions appear in your billing center.
settings.sessionSubtitle: You are signed in on this browser.
settings.signOutHint: Ends your session on this device. Other devices stay signed in until you log out there.
settings.dangerBody: Use sign out above to end this session. For account reset or deletion, contact support. Self-service deletion is not available yet.
settings.securitySubtitle: Update your photo, name, and password.
settings.photoHint: JPG, PNG, or WebP up to 3 MB.

coursesPage.metaDescription: Browse Multivate programs in AI, data, cloud, web, design, German, and career skills.
coursesPage.title: All courses
coursesPage.introLead: Browse programs in tech, German, and career skills.
coursesPage.introTrail: appear here as instructors publish them. Save what you like and enroll from your dashboard.
coursesPage.searchNoResults: No courses match that search. Try different keywords or clear the filter.
coursesPage.emptyCatalog: No courses are listed right now.

courseEnroll.sessionNote: Uses the same account as your dashboard.
courseEnroll.paymentNote: You will complete checkout on the Payments page, then you are enrolled.
courseEnroll.enrolledMsg: You are enrolled. Open My courses to continue.
courseEnroll.studentOnlyTitle: Learner enrollments are for student accounts
courseEnroll.studentOnlyBody: Instructor and admin accounts manage courses and users. To take a course as a learner, register or sign in with a student account.
